description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, high-tech design with a smooth, rounded shell and prominent angular details. The front is dominated by a pair of large, red-tinted visor lenses that give it a striking, insect-like appearance. The helmet includes a robust chin guard with a central protrusion, suggesting enhanced protection or possibly a built-in filtration system. On each side, there are articulated, mechanical-looking attachments that may serve as communication devices or structural supports. The top of the helmet is reinforced with segmented, dark panels, adding both visual interest and potential impact resistance. The overall color scheme is a combination of light gray, dark gray, and vivid red, with no visible branding or decorative graphics.
description: A futuristic, smooth-shelled helmet with red visor lenses, angular side attachments, and a reinforced segmented top in gray and red tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large red visor lenses, central chin guard, and symmetrical side attachments.
description_view_1: Left three-quarter view highlights the helmet's side attachment, the curvature of the shell, and the segmented top panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, showing the segmented top and the symmetrical placement of side attachments.
description_view_3: Right three-quarter view mirrors the left, showing the opposite side attachment and the red visor from an angle.
